preview.title: The Agent-Publisher Economic Model: Why x402 Changes Everything
preview.abstract: First-principles analysis of how autonomous AI agents create a new demand curve for publisher content. Models the transition from human-attention-based pricing to machine-utility-based pricing. Includes game theory analysis of optimal pricing strategies.

preview.title: Trust Signals for the Agentic Web: How Agents Evaluate Content Providers
preview.abstract: Emerging patterns in how AI agents decide which paid APIs and content sources to trust. Covers reputation systems, quality verification, and the role of on-chain transaction history.
